/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -D_GNU_SOURCE -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/echo_client_fixed.dir/Protocol/src/SimpleHeaderProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_client_fixed.dir/Protocol/src/ProtocolFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_client_fixed.dir/NetFramework/src/base/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_client_fixed.dir/NetFramework/src/base/AsyncConsoleLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_client_fixed.dir/NetFramework/src/base/AsyncLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_client_fixed.dir/client/echo_client_fixed.cpp.o -o bin/echo_client_fixed
